briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Rezoning of Two Properties at Walker and Arcola Streets
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would rezone two properties — 7135 Walker and 7244 Arcola — changing what can be built or operated there under Burnaby's zoning rules.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the final council adoption vote — this rezoning could affect nearby property use and development plans.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw No. 14744 — final adoption vote scheduled
